item.description:
What's New

New Features

  • Redesigned Settings Window – Modern native macOS settings experience
  • macOS 14 Sonoma Support – Fully compatible with the latest macOS

Improvements

  • Better Battery Monitoring – More reliable auto-pause when battery is low
  • Reduced Memory Usage – Fixed memory leaks for improved long-term stability
  • Updated Localizations – Improved translations and interface text

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where sleep prevention could stop working unexpectedly
  • Fixed "Allow Display Sleep" option not being applied correctly
  • Fixed notifications not showing in some cases
  • Various stability improvements and crash fixes

Initial Release🎉🎉

  • Initial release of Americano app.
  • Americano is a macOS app that prevents your Mac from sleeping during tasks like downloads and presentations.
